title: A faltering recovery?
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
AstraZeneca's announcement a few days ago that a COVID-19 vaccine trial was temporarily suspended served as a timely reminder that we are still in the middle of the pandemic. The trial has since restarted in the UK, and the company is expressing some optimism that a vaccine could be ready by the end of the year. Whether such an assessment of the situation is overambitious or not is probably best left for the scientific community to judge.
